title: tragopogon collinus
intro: Tragopogon collinus, also known as the low salsify or creeping salsify, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antiseptic properties. The plant is known to have several health benefits, such as reducing inflammation, improving digestive health, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the roots of Tragopogon collinus can be dried and used as a tea or tincture, while the leaves can be used in infusions and salves.
